---
title: "Teaching"
---

#### Macau University of Science and Technology (2024–present)

- Regional Economics (Master's & Bachelor's)
- Finance (MBA)
- Macroeconomics (Bachelor's)
- Monetary Economics (Bachelor's)
- Corporate Finance (Bachelor's)

#### Hunan University (2018–2024)

- Macroeconomics (Master's)
- Microeconomics II (Master's)
- Econometrics I (Master's)
- Transportation Economics (Master's)
